headline: Domino's Tests Slice Sauce And Shinola Tie In To Shape Brand Story
summary: Domino's Pizza (NasdaqGS:DPZ) launches its first proprietary Slice Sauce dip as a new pizza accompaniment. The company partners with lifestyle brand Shinola on a limited-time collaboration featuring access to custom watches and leather goods. The promotion is positioned as a premium brand experience that goes beyond a typical menu update. Domino's Pizza, traded on the NasdaqGS under the ticker DPZ, is best known for its delivery focused pizza business and broad global footprint. The launch...

headline: Atos drives Alsea’s SAP modernization with a strategic migration to SAP RISE on AWS
